verdict.label: KY0_GRADUAL_P_DIVERGENCE
verdict.reading: K_y0 latch−ctrl diverges gradually from early after latch fire; the late sign split is the symptom, not a discrete jump. Consistent with Joseph/P accumulation under withheld dx_att_z (same family as channel-cut → cov dynamics shift).
verdict.next: If GRADUAL: the design target is early P/att dynamics under open Z, not the 1.55 sign flip. Map which P terms (yy / cross / zz) track ΔK_y0.
